sentences.text: Thank you for calling Vacaville Park apartments. Sorry, but we are unavailable to answer your call at this moment. But your call is very important to us. So please be sure to leave a detailed message and we will return your call as soon as possible. If this is a maintenance emergency please press zero for the operator and they'll be able to assist you thank you for calling and have a great day. For quality assurance purposes. This call may be monitored or recorded. Please stay on the line.

conversation.title: Call: Mitch  Scarski  and Glenn Davis @ Eugene Burger Management Corporation
